description: Create a Sales Dashboard mockup in EdrawMax. The dashboard must include a header with the title 'Executive Sales Overview - Q3 2025' and subtitle 'July 1 - September 30, 2025'. Include four KPI cards: Revenue ($4,250,000, +12.5%), Gross Margin (68%, -2.1%), New Customers (142, +8), and Avg Deal Size ($29,500, Flat). Add a bar chart titled 'Revenue by Region' with categories North, South, East, and West, and a donut or pie chart titled 'Sales by Product' with segments for SaaS Platform (50%), On-Premise (30%), and Services (20%). Save the source file to /home/ga/Documents/sales_dashboard.eddx and export the dashboard as an image to /home/ga/Documents/sales_dashboard.png.
